overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player moves from an industrial sidewalk across streets and through intersections, passing towering corporate skyscrapers, industrial facilities, and neon-lit commercial plazas under bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with elevated transit tracks

events.description: pedestrian walks past camera on the sidewalk
steps off sidewalk and crosses onto the asphalt street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then crossing onto the street, moving toward the downtown towers

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking past camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete industrial building with graffiti and metal doors
elevated train track structure running parallel to the street
tall futuristic corporate skyscraper with red logo visible on facade
tall metal tower with multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a concrete sidewalk next to an industrial warehouse in a futuristic city. The camera walks forward, passing a pedestrian, then crosses onto the asphalt street. Elevated monorail tracks run along the left while a massive corporate tower dominates the distant skyline ahead.

events.description: passes two pedestrians walking ahead on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the road passing industrial warehouses and storage tanks

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together on the sidewalk in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: large industrial storage tank with connecting pipes and valves
tall chimney with red and white stripes emitting smoke
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the asphalt road through an industrial district with large storage tanks and warehouses. Two pedestrians walk ahead on the left sidewalk. The Arasaka tower grows larger in the center view while palm trees begin appearing along the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection approaching downtown commercial district

events.description: turns left at the intersection toward the commercial plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching a large intersection with view of downtown skyscrapers and industrial structures

entered.detail: metal highway overpass crossing perpendicular to the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with the massive Arasaka tower now dominating the near view. The camera passes under an overpass structure and approaches the crosswalk. Industrial buildings and smokestacks line the right side while the left opens up to commercial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with neon signage and digital billboards

events.description: turns left into commercial plaza area with bright neon signs
passes through bright sunlight glare reflecting off buildings

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and entering a commercial plaza with neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: multi-story building with bright pink neon signs and glass facade
large vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements
palm tree in concrete planter in the plaza center

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a sunlit commercial plaza, the scene shifts from industrial to retail. Bright neon signs in pink and blue illuminate the left side buildings while large digital billboards cover the right. The camera moves through a brief glare of bright sunlight before continuing into the plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually transforms into a vibrant, sunlit commercial plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside an industrial warehouse, moving past a pedestrian and across an asphalt street beneath elevated monorail tracks. As the camera advances through the industrial zone past storage tanks and warehouses, the massive Arasaka tower grows larger in the skyline while palm trees begin to line the roadside. The scene then opens into a wide intersection, passing under an overpass and between smokestacks and commercial structures as the tower dominates the view. Finally, the camera turns left into a bright plaza, shifting from the industrial gray to a retail environment filled with pink and blue neon signs and large digital billboards under a glare of morning sunlight.
